nasb.text: And when they had assembled with the elders and consulted together, they gave a large sum of money to the soldiers,

esv.text: And when they had assembled with the elders and taken counsel, they gave a sufficient sum of money to the soldiers

cnv.text: 祭司長就和長老聚集在一起商量，然後拿許多錢給士兵，

ccb.text: 祭司长和长老聚集商议，决定用重金买通守墓的卫兵，又吩咐他们：

csbs.text: 祭司长们就与长老们一起聚集商议，给了士兵们许多银钱，
